## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm lint` pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased"
- [ ] New/changed commands support `--json` and return a stable envelope
- [ ] New source adapters are open/legal and pass the adapter contract tests
- [ ] I agree my contribution may be distributed under both the AGPL-3.0 and the
      project's commercial license (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
